arts.ttl: Chelsea drop early team news hint for Brentford match amid Jadon Sancho decision
arts.sum: Chelsea have hinted that Jadon Sancho could start a second straight Premier League match for the Blues when Brentford visit Stamford Bridge on Sunday evening (7pm). After arriving on loan from Manchester United on transfer deadline day, Sancho started the following four league matches before dropping out of the XI and then missing three games through illness.

arts.ttl: Cherki opens up on future amid Chelsea and Liverpool interest
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki has refused to rule out a move away from Lyon following his links with a move to the Premier League. “We’ll see at the end of the season if I’m still here or not,” he replied when asked about his future after Lyon beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-2 in the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brentford – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome Brentford to Stamford Bridge in the Premier League on Sunday evening. The Blues are targeting a seventh successive win in all competitions and will hope to capitalise on slips from Liverpool and Arsenal on Saturday. arts.ttl: 'At the moment': BBC pundit decides if Liverpool are still title favourites ahead of Chelsea after recent draw
arts.sum: Chelsea can close in on them tonight.

arts.ttl: Frank: Chelsea are the best team in the league right now
arts.sum: Frank's team travel to Stamford Bridge on Sunday looking for a first away win of the season against a Chelsea side who could close the gap on leaders Liverpool to two points with victory with a fifth consecutive league victory. Brentford head coach Thomas Frank has said that Chelsea are probably the best team in the Premier League at the moment.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome Brentford to Stamford Bridge in the Premier League on Sunday evening. Enzo Maresca’s team can move within two points of leaders Liverpool with a win over their West London neighbours. Maresca has continued to talk down Chelsea’s chances of competing for the title but the Blues have found real form in recent weeks.
